control.bang.Name: bang
control.bang.description: send the value when the bang input changes

control.bipolar.Name: bipolar
control.bipolar.description: Creates a bipolar mod signal from a 0...1 range

control.blend.Name: blend
control.blend.description: Blends the two input values based on the Alpha parameter.

control.branch_cable.Name: branch_cable
control.branch_cable.description: Send the incoming value to a single output

control.cable_expr.Name: cable_expr
control.cable_expr.description: evaluates an expression for the control value

control.cable_pack.Name: cable_pack
control.cable_pack.description: Uses a slider pack to modify a modulation signal

control.cable_table.Name: cable_table
control.cable_table.description: Modify a modulation signal using a lookup table

control.change.Name: change
control.change.description: Filters out repetitions of the same value

control.clone_cable.Name: clone_cable
control.clone_cable.description: Send different values to cloned nodes

control.clone_forward.Name: clone_forward
control.clone_forward.description: forwards the unscaled input parameter to all clones

control.clone_pack.Name: clone_pack
control.clone_pack.description: control cloned parameters with a slider pack

control.compare.Name: compare
control.compare.description: compares the input signals and outputs either 1.0 or 0.0

control.delay_cable.Name: delay_cable
control.delay_cable.description: Delays the message by a given amount

control.file_analyser.Name: file_analyser
control.file_analyser.description: Extracts file information (pitch, length, etc) and sends it as modulation signal on file load

control.input_toggle.Name: input_toggle
control.input_toggle.description: Switch between two input values as modulation signal

control.intensity.Name: intensity
control.intensity.description: applies the HISE modulation intensity to the value

control.locked_mod.Name: locked_mod
control.locked_mod.description: Adds a scaled modulation dragger to its immediate locked node container parent

control.locked_mod_unscaled.Name: locked_mod_unscaled
control.locked_mod_unscaled.description: Adds a unscaled modulation dragger to its immediate locked node container parent

control.logic_op.Name: logic_op
control.logic_op.description: Combines the (binary) input signals using a logic operator

control.minmax.Name: minmax
control.minmax.description: Scales the input value to a modifyable range

control.pack2_writer.Name: pack2_writer
control.pack2_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack3_writer.Name: pack3_writer
control.pack3_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack4_writer.Name: pack4_writer
control.pack4_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack5_writer.Name: pack5_writer
control.pack5_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack6_writer.Name: pack6_writer
control.pack6_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack7_writer.Name: pack7_writer
control.pack7_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack8_writer.Name: pack8_writer
control.pack8_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pma.Name: pma
control.pma.description: Scales and offsets a modulation signal

control.pma_unscaled.Name: pma_unscaled
control.pma_unscaled.description: multiplies and adds an offset to an unscaled modulation signal

control.ppq.Name: ppq
control.ppq.description: Sends a modulation signal with the playback position in quarters when the clock starts.

control.resetter.Name: resetter
control.resetter.description: Sends an inverted impulse (0,1) to reset gate-like parameters

control.sliderbank.Name: sliderbank
control.sliderbank.description: Scale a value with a slider pack and send it to multiple targets

control.tempo_sync.Name: tempo_sync
control.tempo_sync.description: Sends the tempo duration as modulation signal

control.transport.Name: transport
control.transport.description: Sends a modulation signal when the transport state changes

control.voice_bang.Name: voice_bang
control.voice_bang.description: sends out the current value when a voice is started (note-on is received)

control.xfader.Name: xfader
control.xfader.description: Apply a crossfade to multiple outputs

control.midi.Name: midi
control.midi.description: Create a modulation signal from MIDI input

control.timer.Name: timer
control.timer.description: Create a periodic modulation signal if active
